name: Hyperliquid

model.note: HL vol × Binance market share × 0.026% clean treasury revenue take-rate + USDC yield; MS30/MS90 momentum decays over 12 months; 4 supply/emission scenarios

mcp_bullets: Protocol fee revenue accelerated versus the 180D annualised run rate.
Hyperliquid Perps ranked #1 by 30D derivatives volume in the DefiLlama derivatives category snapshot.
30D market share (16.5%) is running 27% above the 180D baseline (13.0%), signalling momentum acceleration.
Rolling 30D/Binance share grew 5.0pp over the last 90D window (current MS30 16.5%).
At spot, clean-revenue-only buyback horizon is 31.4Y (trailing 30D clean treasury revenue / target supply at spot price).
caveats: Market share (MS90) from DefiLlama MCP derivatives volume vs scaled Binance BTCUSDT proxy.
USDC yield modeled separately from perp revenue; TVL follows HL volume path via estimated elasticity.
Supply scenarios range from DB-observed emissions (~1M/mo) to worst-case non-circulating overhang release.
